defs: The state or quality of being fertile or fruitful; fruitfulness; productiveness; fecundity; richness; abundance of resources; fertile invention; quickness; readiness; as, the fertility of soil, or of imagination.
quotes: And all her husbandry doth lie on heaps Corrupting in its own fertility.
Thy very weeds are beautiful; thy waste More rich than other climes' fertility.
